caption: A woman with dark hair wearing a striped purple and white shirt is centered in the frame, wearing a black headset with a microphone positioned near her mouth. She is positioned in an indoor setting with a light-colored wall behind her and pale yellow curtains to her left. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the lower-left corner of each scene. Throughout the clip, the woman maintains a steady gaze toward the camera with a neutral to slightly concerned facial expression. Her head movements are minimal, and she remains in the same position across the sequence. No other people or significant objects are visible, and the background remains static, showing a glimpse of a furniture surface to her right.
